chunks.title: Call to Praise and Benefits
chunks.reason: The psalmist invites his soul to bless Yahweh and lists specific benefits received.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Character and Compassion
chunks.reason: A theological argument describing God's justice, mercy, and fatherly compassion.

chunks.title: Fragility of Man and Eternity of God
chunks.reason: A contrast between the fleeting nature of human life and the enduring covenant love of God.

chunks.title: Universal Call to Praise
chunks.reason: A final exhortation for angels, hosts, and all creation to bless Yahweh.
